name: Bad Request
description: The request could not be understood due to malformed syntax.

name: Unauthorized
description: The request requires user authentication.

name: Payment Required
description: Reserved for future use.

name: Forbidden
description: The server understood the request but refuses to fulfill it.

name: Not Found
description: The requested user or resource was not found.

name: Method Not Allowed
description: The method specified is not allowed.

name: Not Acceptable
description: The resource can only generate unacceptable content.

name: Proxy Authentication Required
description: The request requires proxy authentication.

name: Request Timeout
description: The user could not be located in time.

name: Conflict
description: User already registered.

name: Gone
description: The user existed previously but is no longer available.

name: Length Required
description: The server requires a valid content length.

name: Conditional Request Failed
description: The specified precondition was not met.

name: Request Entity Too Large
description: The request body exceeds server limits.

name: Request URI Too Long
description: The URI exceeds server limitations.

name: Unsupported Media Type
description: The request body format is unsupported.

name: Unsupported URI Scheme
description: The URI scheme is not recognized.

name: Unknown Resource-Priority
description: Unsupported Resource-Priority header encountered.

name: Bad Extension
description: Unsupported SIP extension used.

name: Extension Required
description: A required SIP extension is missing.

name: Session Interval Too Small
description: Session expiration interval is below minimum.

name: Interval Too Brief
description: Resource expiration time is too short.

name: Bad Location Information
description: Location content is malformed or unsatisfactory.

name: Use Identity Header
description: An Identity header is required.

name: Provide Referrer Identity
description: A valid Referred-By token was not provided.

name: Flow Failed
description: A specific user-agent flow failed.

name: Anonymity Disallowed
description: Anonymous requests are not permitted.

name: Bad Identity Info
description: Identity-Info header could not be dereferenced.

name: Unsupported Certificate
description: Certificate validation failed.

name: Invalid Identity Header
description: Identity header signature validation failed.

name: First Hop Lacks Outbound Support
description: Outbound support is unavailable on the first proxy hop.

name: Max-Breadth Exceeded
description: Insufficient Max-Breadth value for parallel forking.

name: Bad Info Package
description: Unsupported INFO package received.

name: Consent Needed
description: Recipient consent is required.

name: Temporarily Unavailable
description: The callee is currently unavailable.

name: Call/Transaction Does Not Exist
description: The request does not match an existing transaction.

name: Loop Detected
description: A routing loop was detected.

name: Too Many Hops
description: Max-Forwards reached zero.

name: Address Incomplete
description: The Request-URI is incomplete.

name: Ambiguous
description: The Request-URI is ambiguous.

name: Busy Here
description: The callee is busy.

name: Request Terminated
description: The request was terminated by CANCEL or BYE.

name: Not Acceptable Here
description: Session description is unacceptable.

name: Bad Event
description: Unsupported event package specified.

name: Request Pending
description: A pending request already exists.

name: Undecipherable
description: Encrypted content could not be decrypted.

name: Security Agreement Required
description: A negotiated security mechanism is required.

name: Server Internal Error
description: Unexpected server condition prevented fulfillment.

name: Not Implemented
description: The SIP method is not implemented.

name: Bad Gateway
description: Invalid response received from downstream server.

name: Service Unavailable
description: The server is overloaded or under maintenance.

name: Server Time-out
description: A downstream server did not respond in time.

name: Version Not Supported
description: Unsupported SIP version.

name: Message Too Large
description: Message exceeds processing limits.

name: Push Notification Service Not Supported
description: The specified push notification service is unsupported.

name: Precondition Failure
description: Specified session constraints cannot be met.

name: Busy Everywhere
description: All possible destinations are busy.

name: Decline
description: The destination declined the call.

name: Does Not Exist Anywhere
description: The requested user does not exist anywhere.

name: Not Acceptable
description: Session parameters are not acceptable.

name: Unwanted
description: The called party rejected the caller.
